subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest toward the divine horizon! Render thanks for the hidden favours of the Blessed Beauty, Who, after His ascension unto the Kingdom of His glory [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناظر بشطر الهی شکر الطاف خفیه جمال مبارک را که بعد از صعود بملکوت عزتش از
subcodes.subjects: @material and spiritual existence; two books, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @Ascension of Baha'u'llah
